Package io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck

Class NumberCheck<T extends Number & Comparable<T>>

java.lang.Object
io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck.AbstractCheck<SELF,T>
io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck.OrderedCheck<NumberCheck<T>,T>
io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck.NumberCheck<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the boxed number type
All Implemented Interfaces:
Check<NumberCheck<T>,T>
public final class NumberCheck<T extends Number & Comparable<T>> extends OrderedCheck<NumberCheck<T>,T>
Fluent assertions for numeric values (int, long, double, etc.).
